sheet_name: แบบขยายบันได ST.1 / ST.2
view_title: แปลนบันได ST.1 + รูปตัดบันได ST.1 (มาตราส่วน 1:25)

element.description: Short entry/porch steps connecting carport (จอดรถ) up to a covered porch (เฉลียง) and a raised relax deck (พักผ่อน) — NOT a full inter-floor staircase; this is a single-story house, so 'ST.1' is a small level-change step run.
element.grid_ref: row A, between column gridlines 2 and 3
element.tread_finish: ลูกนอนบันได ผิวปูกระเบื้องเซรามิค 8"x8" (ceramic tile 8in x 8in on tread/riser faces)
element.nosing: จมูกบันได อลูมิเนียมสีเงิน ร่อง PVC ขนาด 2" (silver aluminum stair nosing with 2 inch PVC groove insert)

warnings: This page (A-11) contains two distinct stair/step details, ST.1 and ST.2, each with its own plan + section. Per project convention for mixed-pattern pages, they are split into separate files: this file (ST.1) and the sibling บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า13_stair_st2.json (ST.2).
Text in the finish/nosing notes is small printed Thai text near hatched material symbols — transcribed as best-effort; exact tread material spec should be zoom-verified.

No rebar/main_bar/stirrup callouts were visible on this sheet — these are architectural finish-level step details (tile-finished concrete steps), not a structural rebar detail, so those fields are left null rather than guessed.
